Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 6:

A comment in the test says "The OSS should panic during stop ost1 ...". From the console logs for the OSTs, OST0 goes into recovery 
"
22:51:35:[  396.671615] LDISKFS-fs (dm-0): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: errors=panic,,errors=remount-ro,no_mbcache,nodelalloc
22:51:35:[  397.098315] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n health_check
22:51:35:[  397.328539] Lustre: lustre-OST0000: Will be in recovery for at least 1:00, or until 4 clients reconnect
22:51:35:[  397.330929] Lustre: lustre-OST0000: Connection restored to 445a700f-098a-6d90-f95f-2e24a44be9bc (at 10.2.4.152@tcp)
"
and
"
22:51:35:[  417.518205] LDISKFS-fs warning (device dm-0): ldiskfs_multi_mount_protect:322: MMP interval 42 higher than expected, please wait.
"
Is this evidence of the panic or should we see more in the logs?

parents.subject: LU-9917 lnet: rediscover peer if it changed

commit.subject: LU-8812 test: add failback test with errors=panic
commit.message:
LU-8812 test: add failback test with errors=panic

This is test for MRP-1658 which create activity and
emulate failback operations. Option errors=panic
is using similar to production servers. Test requires
ENABLE_QUOTA=yes option.

Intel_bug_id: SEA-107
Seagate_bug_id: MRP-1658

It is unnecessary to wait IO process in test_92. It
may spend a long time to finish on a big OST.

Test-Parameters: trivial  envdefinitions=ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,ONLY=92  clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1  austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1  testlist=replay-single
Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander_boyko@xyratex.com>
Change-Id: Iae6765b747ff266e6a44df8ebcd48cfba1991837
Tested-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena_gryaznova@xyratex.com>
Reviewed-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena_gryaznova@xyratex.com>
Reviewed-by: Andrew Perepechko <andrew_perepechko@xyratex.com>
Reviewed-by: Vitaly Fertman <vitaly_fertman@xyratex.com>
Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
